meaning: n.技术专家,工艺学家,工艺人员
examples: These seem to be some of the ways in which a successful scientist or technologist thinks and acts.
Dad, a 68-year-old retired technologist and grandfather of four, had carefully considered my message, and crafted a response.
In designing a diesel engine, a technologist might impress individual ways of nonverbal thinking on the machine by continually using an intuitive sense of rightness and fitness.
If you are a creative technologist, you may come at it from a technology perspective.
Without it however, the CIO is just another lost technologist, playing with complicated toys.
